description_long: This vending machine features a tall, rectangular form with a large glass front panel that displays a variety of snacks and beverages arranged on multiple shelves. The front is framed in a light gray border, with a black side panel housing a digital display, keypad, and payment interface. The interior is brightly lit, making the products clearly visible through the glass. The sides and back of the machine are solid black, with no visible openings or features. At the bottom of the front panel, there is a product retrieval slot, and the machine stands on a flat base. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in public urban environments.
description: A modern, glass-fronted vending machine with visible snacks and drinks, a digital display, keypad, and payment interface on a black side panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass display with products, digital display, keypad, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view showing a solid black panel with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing another solid black panel with no visible features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular digital display is located on the right side of the front panel, above the keypad, with a blue illuminated area.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, including a keypad and what appears to be a card slot and possibly a bill acceptor.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with individual buttons is located below the digital display on the right side of the front panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, horizontal slot is located at the bottom of the front panel, likely with a flap for retrieving purchased products.
